name: windows-update-lockdown
description: Keep automatic Windows Updates disabled. Windows self-heals its update components (WaaSMedicSvc / Update Orchestrator re-enable wuauserv and re-create scan tasks), so a one-time disable drifts back. This deploys enforce-no-updates.ps1 to C:\ProgramData\MAST\windows-update and registers a daily + at-startup SYSTEM scheduled task ('mast-no-windows-updates') that re-asserts the GP NoAutoUpdate policy, re-disables the update services, and disables the UpdateOrchestrator/WindowsUpdate scan tasks; it also runs once at provision time. Best-effort by design (the Medic service can re-enable within a day; the daily run corrects drift).
